title: Opening OneNote links in OneNote desktop application instead of OneNote Browser
excerpt: Monday.com will add a https:// in front of onenote:https://… (which forces the OneNote link to open in the OneNote desktop app instead of on the OneNote browser) when pasting a OneNote link in a link Monday Link Column. …

posts.author: wlo (Wayne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday.com will add a https:// in front of onenote:https://… (which forces the OneNote link to open in the OneNote desktop app instead of on the OneNote browser) when pasting a OneNote link in a link Monday Link Column. This kills the link.

I need a workaround for this, using text or long text doesn’t work.
